✦ Module 2 ✦

🎭

Archetypes of the Soul

The Major Arcana

The 22 Major Arcana cards are the soul cards of the tarot. They represent the universal patterns, archetypal forces, and profound life themes that every human navigates on their journey from ignorance to enlightenment — from The Fool to The World.

✦ Learning Objectives

  • ✦ Learn all 22 Major Arcana cards, their numbers, imagery, and core meanings
  • ✦ Understand the Fool's Journey as a metaphor for the human life cycle
  • ✦ Connect each archetype to real patterns and experiences in your own life
  • ✦ Practice reading Major Arcana cards intuitively and contextually

The Fool's Journey

The 22 Major Arcana tell the story of The Fool — numbered 0, representing the soul entering this life experience. As The Fool journeys through the cards, they encounter every force, wisdom, challenge, and transformation that a human life can offer.

This is not a linear journey — we cycle through these archetypes throughout our lives, visiting them again and again at new levels of understanding. When a Major Arcana card appears in a reading, it signals that a significant life lesson or archetypal energy is at work.

The 22 Major Arcana

0

The Fool

beginnings · innocence · spontaneity · free spirit

Upright: New beginnings, innocence, spontaneity, a free spirit

Reversed: Holding back, recklessness, risk-taking

What new adventure is calling to you? What would you do if you weren't afraid?

1

The Magician

manifestation · resourcefulness · power · inspired action

Upright: Manifestation, resourcefulness, power, inspired action

Reversed: Manipulation, poor planning, untapped talents

What tools and resources do you already have to manifest your goals?

2

The High Priestess

intuition · sacred knowledge · divine feminine · the subconscious mind

Upright: Intuition, sacred knowledge, divine feminine, the subconscious mind

Reversed: Secrets, disconnected from intuition, withdrawal

What does your intuition whisper when you go quiet and listen?

3

The Empress

femininity · beauty · nature · nurturing · abundance

Upright: Femininity, beauty, nature, nurturing, abundance

Reversed: Creative block, dependence on others, neglect

How are you nurturing yourself and others? Where can you invite more abundance?

4

The Emperor

authority · establishment · structure · fatherhood

Upright: Authority, establishment, structure, a father figure

Reversed: Domination, excessive control, rigidity, inflexibility

Where do you need more structure in your life? How do you relate to authority?

5

The Hierophant

spiritual wisdom · religious beliefs · conformity · tradition

Upright: Spiritual wisdom, religious beliefs, conformity, tradition, institutions

Reversed: Personal beliefs, freedom, challenging the status quo

What traditions serve you? Which ones are you ready to question or release?

6

The Lovers

love · harmony · relationships · values alignment · choices

Upright: Love, harmony, relationships, values alignment, choices

Reversed: Self-love, disharmony, imbalance, misaligned values

What choice are you facing that requires you to align with your deepest values?

7

The Chariot

control · willpower · success · action · determination

Upright: Control, willpower, success, action, determination

Reversed: Self-discipline, opposition, lack of direction

What are you driving toward? What opposing forces do you need to harness?

8

Strength

strength · courage · persuasion · influence · compassion

Upright: Strength, courage, persuasion, influence, compassion

Reversed: Inner strength, self-doubt, low energy, raw emotion

Where in your life are you being called to show gentle strength and compassion?

9

The Hermit

soul-searching · introspection · being alone · inner guidance

Upright: Soul-searching, introspection, being alone, inner guidance

Reversed: Isolation, loneliness, withdrawal

What wisdom comes when you go within and seek your own inner light?

10

Wheel of Fortune

good luck · karma · life cycles · destiny · a turning point

Upright: Good luck, karma, life cycles, destiny, a turning point

Reversed: Bad luck, resistance to change, breaking cycles

How do you respond when the wheel turns unexpectedly? What cycles are completing?

11

Justice

justice · fairness · truth · cause and effect · law

Upright: Justice, fairness, truth, cause and effect, law

Reversed: Unfairness, lack of accountability, dishonesty

Where in your life are you being called to act with fairness and integrity?

12

The Hanged Man

pause · surrender · letting go · new perspectives

Upright: Pause, surrender, letting go, new perspectives

Reversed: Delays, resistance, stalling, indecision

What would shift in your life if you surrendered control and saw things from a new angle?

13

Death

endings · change · transformation · transition

Upright: Endings, change, transformation, transition

Reversed: Resistance to change, personal transformation, inner purging

What needs to end in your life to make space for transformation and new beginnings?

14

Temperance

balance · moderation · patience · purpose

Upright: Balance, moderation, patience, purpose

Reversed: Imbalance, excess, self-healing, realignment

Where are you being called to practice balance, patience, and moderation?

15

The Devil

shadow self · attachment · addiction · restriction · sexuality

Upright: Shadow self, attachment, addiction, restriction, sexuality

Reversed: Releasing limiting beliefs, exploring dark thoughts, detachment

What chains are you allowing to bind you? What shadow aspects need your compassionate attention?

16

The Tower

sudden change · upheaval · chaos · revelation · awakening

Upright: Sudden change, upheaval, chaos, revelation, awakening

Reversed: Personal transformation, fear of change, averting disaster

What structures in your life need to be dismantled so something more authentic can emerge?

17

The Star

hope · faith · purpose · renewal · spirituality

Upright: Hope, faith, purpose, renewal, spirituality

Reversed: Lack of faith, despair, self-trust, disconnection

What hope or dream continues to shine for you even in dark times?

18

The Moon

illusion · fear · the subconscious · anxiety · confusion

Upright: Illusion, fear, the subconscious, anxiety, confusion

Reversed: Release of fear, repressed emotion, inner confusion

What illusions or fears are distorting your perception of reality right now?

19

The Sun

positivity · fun · warmth · success · vitality

Upright: Positivity, fun, warmth, success, vitality

Reversed: Inner child, feeling down, overly optimistic

Where is joy wanting to shine through you? What gives you pure, uncomplicated delight?

20

Judgement

judgement · rebirth · inner calling · absolution

Upright: Judgement, rebirth, inner calling, absolution

Reversed: Self-doubt, inner critic, ignoring the call

What calling or awakening is asking you to rise up and transform?

21

The World

completion · integration · accomplishment · travel

Upright: Completion, integration, accomplishment, travel

Reversed: Seeking personal closure, short-cuts, delays

What cycles are completing for you? How have you grown through this journey?

🎯 Activity: Personal Archetype Pull

Remove only the 22 Major Arcana from your deck. Shuffle while asking: "Which archetype is most active in my life right now?"

Pull one card and journal for 10 minutes about how this archetype's energy is manifesting in your current life chapter. Where do you see it? What is it asking of you?

📓 Worksheets

Visit the Worksheets page for:

  • ✦ My Fool's Journey Map — chart your personal life journey through 22 archetypes
  • ✦ Archetype Mirror — explore how each archetype shows up in your life and relationships

💬 Discussion Prompts

  • Q: Which Major Arcana card resonates most with your current life chapter?
  • Q: How do you see the Fool's Journey reflected in your own life?
  • Q: Which archetype feels most challenging for you to embody?
